Order To Show Cause To Defendant James Shippy As To Why Sanctions Of $125.00 Should Not Be Imposed For Filing A Frivolous Demurrer Pursuant To Ccp 128.5
Off Calendar Sep-13-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES
Mathias Mahnke, Esq. (408) 453-2005 for Defendant James Shippy
RULING:
No other appearances. The court adopted its tentative: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO DEFENDANT JAMES SHIPPY AS TO WHY SANCTIONS OF $125.00 SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FILING A FRIVOLOUS DEMURRER PURSUANT TO CCP128.5: OFF CALENDAR. ADDED TO AND REMOVED FROM CALENDAR ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. (301/PHA) REPORTER: BOB BALIAN, CSR #5220

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-23-2004 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Marina Franco, Esq., Law Office of Arnold Evje (415) 861-6070 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Chinatown Community Development
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. DEFENDANT JAMES SHIPPY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: OVERRULED with 5 days leave to answer from date of notice of entry. Order signed. The Court will issue an ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE against James Shippy personally returnable 09/13/04 in Dept. 301 as to why sanctions of $125.00 should not be entered against him for filing a frivolous demurrer pursuant o CCP 128.5. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
